title: United States v. Hernandez, No. 0:22-cr-60129-AHS (S.D. Fla. Jun. 10, 2022)
text:
From April 2019 to October 2021, the defendant, Lazaro Hernandez, was involved in a US-wide scheme distributing more than USD 230 million worth adulterated, misbranded and diverted drugs, including human immunodeficiency virus (“HIV”) medication.

The defendant and his co-conspirators established numerous limited liability companies, including AllSource Medical Supply LLC, RSNE LLC, A1A Wholesale LLC, Gentek LLC and My Meds LLC, in various U.S. states for which they obtained wholesale drug distributor licenses.

They acquired large quantities of diverted prescription drugs, including HIV medication, which could be billed to health insurers. They repackaged these drugs, falsified their packaging and pedigrees or other labeling to conceal their true origin. 

Subsequently, they sold the falsified medical products to their co-conspirators at three wholesale companies at steep discounts, for which they were paid a total of USD 230 million. 

The falsified medical products were eventually sold and shipped to individual pharmacies throughout the U.S., which sold them to unsuspecting patients and billed to health care benefit programs.

The defendant and his co-conspirators laundered those hundreds of millions of dollars through the use of several corporations. The defendant also used his share of the proceeds to purchase luxury goods, including a USD 280,000 Lamborghini, a USD 220,000 Mercedes, and three boats. 

On 10 June 2022, the defendant was charged with Conspiracy to Introduce Adulterated and Misbranded Drugs and to Defraud the United States, Conspiracy to Traffic in Pre-Retail Medical Products with False Documentation, Conspiracy to Commit Money Laundering, and three counts of Money Laundering. He was arrested one week later.

On 7 April 2023, he pleaded guilty to Conspiracy to Introduce Adulterated and Misbranded Drugs and to Defraud the United States and Conspiracy to Commit Money Laundering. He was sentenced to 15 years in prison on 15 June 2023.
crime_types: Participation in an organized criminal group
